# MEM — Series / audience memory

Genus: **Memoria**

Whether the video belongs to a repeatable account promise.

| ID | Scientific-style name | Area | Hypothesis | Metric | Method |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| H149 | *Memoria serialis* var. h149-series-recurring-structure | Series memory | Series with recurring structure but variable examples outperform random formats. | FOL | M-SEQ |
| H427 | *Memoria serialis* var. h427-series-should-test | Series testing | A series should test one stable promise with variable examples. | MIX | M-SEQ |
| H428 | *Memoria serialis* var. h428-series-intros-should | Series testing | Series intros should be shorter as audience familiarity grows. | MIX | M-SEQ |
